final:
module reset_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0000; // Reset output to 0
        end else begin
            out <= out + 1; // Increment output
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b1111;
      end else begin
        out <= out - 1;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
